title: helianthus verticillatus
intro: Helianthus verticillatus, also known as swamp sunflower, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthus verticillatus include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparation of the plant typically involves making a tea from its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
